textPlain: KeithS alias ChibiAkumas alias Akuyou has been churning out games and assembly tutorials for years, and he’s covered a huge array of platforms: everything from the FM-7 to the SAM Coupé to the UKMC Soviet-bloc microcomputer PDP-11 clone.

Amazing and really fast old school webpage :)I highly recommend to pick up ASM programming on Z80 or 6502 CPUs: it is MUCH MUCH easier and straight forward than modern x86 ASM with 1600+ instructions.
